name: Langkit_Support.Tree_Traversal_Iterator

documentation.description:
This package provides iterators on general trees. Children are supposed to
have indexes and nodes must have a back-link to their parent.

tagged_types.name: Traverse_Iterator
tagged_types.code: type Traverse_Iterator is new Iterators.Iterator with private;

subprograms.name: Create_Tree_Iterator

documentation.description:
Create an iterator that will yield all nodes in Root in prefix depth
first order (DFS).

subprograms.name: Next

documentation.description: Return the index of the first child in N

formals.name: Get_Child
formals.code:
function Get_Child
(N : Node_Type; Index : Natural) return Node_Type

documentation.description:
Return the Index-th child in N. Trees are allowed to have "holes" in
children, so Get_Child can return No_Node.

Return the parent node for N. Returning No_Node means that N is the root
node.

formals.name: Iterators
formals.code:
with package Iterators is new Langkit_Support.Iterators
  (Node_Type, Node_Array);

documentation.description: Return the index of the last child in N
Special value to represent the absence of a node

formals.name: Node_Array
formals.code: type Node_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Node_Type;

documentation.description: Type to use for array of nodes
Type for the node of trees to traverse
